+triplane = scene_codes if isinstance(scene_codes, torch.Tensor) else scene_codes[0]

+output = model.renderer(model.decoder, triplane, rays_o, rays_d)

+print('SUCCESS with model.renderer(model.decoder, triplane, rays_o, rays_d)')

+print('Output type:', type(output))

+if isinstance(output, dict):

+    print('Output keys:', list(output.keys()))

+    rgb = output.get('comp_rgb', output.get('rgb', None))

+else:

+    rgb = output

+print('RGB tensor shape before processing:', rgb.shape if torch.is_tensor(rgb) else type(rgb))

+if rgb.dim() == 4 and rgb.shape[0] == 1:

+    rgb = rgb.squeeze(0)

+if rgb.shape[0] == 3 and rgb.dim() == 3:

+    rgb = rgb.permute(1, 2, 0)

+rgb = rgb.clamp(0.0, 1.0)

+pil_img = to_pil_image(rgb.permute(2, 0, 1))

+rgba_img = pil_img.convert('RGBA')

+rgba_img.save('test_render.png')

+print('Saved test_render.png successfully')

+print('Inspection completed.')
